title: ZZS, NA, AS agree on possible cooperation in new government
summary_full: The National Alliance (NA), the Union of Greens and Farmers (ZZS), and the United List (AS) reached a preliminary agreement on Thursday to cooperate in forming a new government.
summary_public: The National Alliance (NA), the Union of Greens and Farmers (ZZS), and the United List (AS) reached a preliminary agreement on Thursday to cooperate in forming a new government.
